title: Riot Games Summoner
description: A League of Legends summoner profile from the Riot Games API

puuid.description: Encrypted PUUID (globally unique, use for cross-game lookups)

name.description: Summoner name (deprecated, use Riot ID gameName+tagLine)

profileIconId.description: Profile icon ID, resolvable via Data Dragon

revisionDate.description: Unix timestamp of last profile update
